name: Namely
description: Namely HR, payroll, and benefits platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Namely
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create an API access token with read permissions
4. Enter your subdomain and paste the token below

credentialFields.label: Company Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Namely subdomain (e.g. if your URL is acme.namely.com, enter: acme)

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an OAuth access token in Namely → Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Namely profiles to verify employee records and access
